summary: Iteration 170 - All View Dialog and PPR Navigation features verified. Mill Entries View button (Eye icon) opens dialog popup with full entry details. PPR row click navigates to Mill Entries and opens View dialog. round_amount function works correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All View Dialog features working correctly. Mill Entries table has Eye icon View button that opens dialog popup (NOT expand). PPR row click navigates to Mill Entries tab and opens View dialog for that entry. Python round_amount function correctly rounds >0.50 up and <=0.50 down.

mill_entries_view_button.eye_icon_visible: PASS - Eye icon View buttons visible on each row (data-testid='view-btn-{entryId}')
mill_entries_view_button.click_opens_dialog: PASS - Clicking Eye icon opens ViewEntryDialog popup
mill_entries_view_button.dialog_shows_all_fields: PASS - Dialog shows Date, KMS Year, Season, Truck No, RST No, TP No, Agent, Mandi, QNTL, Bags, G.Deposite, GBW Cut, Plastic Bag, P.Pkt Cut, Mill W, Moisture %, Moisture Cut, Cutting %, Cutting, D/D/P, Final W, G.Issued, KG, Cash Paid, Diesel Paid, Created By, Created At, Remark

ppr_row_click_navigation.ppr_table_visible: PASS - Paddy Purchase Register table with 6 entries
ppr_row_click_navigation.row_click_navigates: PASS - Clicking PPR row navigates to Mill Entries tab
ppr_row_click_navigation.view_dialog_opens: PASS - View dialog opens automatically for clicked entry
ppr_row_click_navigation.mill_entries_tab_active: PASS - Mill Entries sub-tab becomes active after navigation

filter_restore_after_dialog_close.saved_filters_before_view: PASS - savedFiltersBeforeView stores filters before PPR navigation
filter_restore_after_dialog_close.filters_restored_on_close: PASS - handleCloseViewEntry restores filters from savedFiltersBeforeView

get_entry_by_id_api.success_response: PASS - Returns full entry object with all fields
